title: Huawei AR303 Gigabit router, SFP / ETH WAN
category: Huawei / LAN networks / Routers and Firewalls
description: Huawei AR303 is a powerful and compact enterprise router designed for small and medium-sized businesses, offering high-speed connectivity and advanced network functions. It features an ETH/SFP WAN port for connection flexibility, multi-WAN configuration options to increase reliability, support for VPN protocols , and advanced security features to protect data. With easy management and centralized configuration capabilities, it is an ideal choice for businesses that require a stable and secure… Device 12V / 2A DC power adapter Ground cable
